section_name: Service on nonresidents and certain residents, administrators or executors
text: For the purposes of § 252 (Exemption of certain in-transit vehicle registrations) , an ATV shall be a vehicle and the provisions of that section and section two hundred fifty-three of this chapter shall apply to ATVs.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 11
#### Article 48
##### § 2412 — Service on nonresidents and certain residents, administrators or executors

For the purposes of § 252 (Exemption of certain in-transit vehicle registrations) , an ATV shall be a vehicle and the provisions of that section and section two hundred fifty-three of this chapter shall apply to ATVs.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: For the purposes of § 252 (Exemption of certain in-transit vehicle registrations) , an ATV shall be a vehicle and the provisions of that section and section two hundred fifty-three of this chapter shall apply to ATVs.
